blocks.content: Triggers (4)

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: What is going on?
Lupist and Plu, who had just left the conference room of Yongrae, froze in front of the hallway window.
A massive pyramid loomed faintly beyond the horizon.
Even with modern technology, it would take years to build such a structure.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Impossible.
The fact that it was erected in an instant made no sense.
Shirone came running.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Mr. Lupist.
Ikael's group had left for the sun, and he had activated a simultaneous event at Delta headquarters.
Some unknown agreement had taken place, but they did not show it.
Plu asked.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: What is that?

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: It seems to be something from the Kingdom of Paras. Probably… a structure from an ancient civilization.
Lupist's expression became serious.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: I thought it was built with direct intervention from the outer world. Why now?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ancient civilizations existed before human history. I suspect it's a passage connecting to the outer world. Soon, the world's system will change.
Shirone spoke about the state of the angels.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Angels with hearts have not changed. That means it's not immediately harmful to humans.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: That may be true, but the impact will be significant. Moreover, the intensity will increase over time.
A Delta official approached.

blocks.speaker: Delta Official
blocks.content: An emergency holy war meeting is starting. Representatives from each country are to gather at headquarters quickly.
Other countries also seemed to be in turmoil over the current situation.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Kitra will come too.
Lupist said.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Let's go. Something will come up. It's best to listen first and then respond.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Go ahead.
Lupist turned his head at the unexpected remark, but Shirone remained silent.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Wizard.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: By now, it should have been settled in some way, but the silence was strange.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I have somewhere to stop by.
As Shirone ran down the hallway, Lupist and Plu looked at each other's faces.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: He didn't notice, did he?

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: No.
It was only a matter of time anyway.
At the place where she had fought Havitz, Wizard had been lost in thought for a long time.
When even her tears had dried up, she slowly raised her hands and grasped her neck.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: As expected.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Dying was the right thing to do.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: With her already broken spirit, she couldn't face Havitz again.
As her grip tightened and oxygen was cut off from her brain, the scenery sparkled.
Her face turned red, but her expression did not change.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: I'm not afraid of dying.
What she truly feared was Shirone's face looking down at her corpse with pity.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: I'm sorry, brother.
As consciousness faded and death approached, her heart gradually felt lighter.
It must have been because she had carried so much.
Sob. Sob.
Tears flowed down.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: I will die.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Rather than living and disappointing Shirone, it was better to meet him as a corpse.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Just a little more.
As her mind convulsed from the shock and she no longer felt pain…
Aaaah.
Wizard eventually let go of her hands.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Just promise me one thing.
Shirone had said.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Do whatever you want. If you think that way, I will support you. But… Never think it's impossible.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: I'm sorry. I'm sorry…

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: She had to fight.
Her destiny and genius existed solely for that purpose.
Grabbing her trembling legs, Wizard stood up.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Kill Havitz.
She could no longer look at him indifferently, but she understood Havitz that much more.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: It's about not killing him.
That was also the way Gustav IV targeted Havitz.

blocks.speaker: Balkan
blocks.content: You can't kill Havitz.

blocks.speaker: Balkan
blocks.content: The event of killing Havitz doesn't happen. Therefore, to kill Havitz…

blocks.speaker: Zetaro
blocks.content: You must not kill him.

blocks.speaker: Balkan
blocks.content: Right. It's a contradiction, but as long as we like Havitz, we can still approach him.

blocks.speaker: Natasha
blocks.content: What about Vanishing?

blocks.speaker: Balkan
blocks.content: It's hard to expect purity from us. But that's because they don't know Havitz well.

blocks.speaker: Smoto
blocks.content: There's no way to stop Vanishing, but you can make it so it doesn't activate. That's what you mean, right?
That was also a contradiction.

blocks.speaker: Balkan
blocks.content: I first realized it when I married Abella. On the first night, she tied Havitz tightly to the bed.
Zetaro also recalled that time.

blocks.speaker: Zetaro
blocks.content: I noticed the assassination plan late and went to Havitz's room. It was close.

blocks.speaker: Balkan
blocks.content: No, it was already too late. If Abella had stabbed with the 'Law Kill,' Havitz would have died. But then Havitz…
Told Balkan to leave.

blocks.speaker: Balkan
blocks.content: Everything is just a joke. Regarding the death that comes with goodwill, Havitz seems to expect it. Even his own death must be interesting.

blocks.speaker: Smoto
blocks.content: It's easy to say, but it's difficult in reality. Maintaining such a contradictory mental state is not human.

blocks.speaker: Balkan
blocks.content: Or it's genuine.
Balkan turned his head.

blocks.speaker: Balkan
blocks.content: You.
The three of them looked at Zetaro.
Havitz muttered as he walked through the forest.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: How thrilling.
There was only one thing he had not experienced despite committing all the world's evils.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: Dying.
Ten shadows appeared at his feet, and Siok reappeared.

blocks.speaker: Siok
blocks.content: Satan, you called.
They still thought Wizard should die, but a fanatic could not hold a grudge against their god.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: Two are missing. Teeth are gone.

blocks.speaker: Siok
blocks.content: I'm sorry.
Currently, the positions of 4 o'clock and 12 o'clock were vacant due to their deaths.
However, that was only from a human perspective. From the perspective of a god, concepts never disappear.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: Hurry up and elect replacements.
It wasn't something that could be rushed, but Havitz wanted to have a proper 'playtime.'

blocks.speaker: Siok
blocks.content: Understood.
The Siok.
These were the 12 positions uniquely capable of traveling between reality and hell, even when the spiritual realm was sealed.
In the deep caves of the reverse world, Etella lay turned toward the darkness, as if lifeless, deep in sleep.
She had asked countless times about the duration of purification.
87 aeons and 2,875 epochs…
When she heard this was the seventh-longest time since the reverse world had existed, she crumbled.

blocks.speaker: Etella
blocks.content: I wish I were dead.
Even as she slept, she desperately wished for it.
If only she could close her eyes and forget herself, she hoped never to awaken again.
Haa…
Even sleep became unbearable, and when she awoke to reality, clear tears streamed down her face.
Connected by the chain of yin and yang, Shagal leaned against the wall of the cave, lost in thought.
There was more than enough time—an overabundance, in fact.

blocks.speaker: Shagal
blocks.content: Director…
Raiden, the director of the circus troupe.
The man who had killed the only person Shagal had ever loved, Tia. In turn, Shagal had driven a dagger into Raiden's body.

blocks.speaker: Shagal
blocks.content: Was it all a lie?
The Green Circus Troupe had never existed in this world.

blocks.speaker: Shagal
blocks.content: Or… did it?
Having fallen to hell and reached his current state, a thought had crossed his mind.

blocks.speaker: Shagal
blocks.content: Then what is real?

blocks.speaker: Shagal
blocks.content: Do the people living within their memories hold the truth of the world, except for me?
His gaze shifted to Etella.

blocks.speaker: Shagal
blocks.content: Tia…
Though her face was turned away and unseen, Shagal was convinced she was Tia.

blocks.speaker: Shagal
blocks.content: Because I believe so.
In reality, he didn't know Tia's face, nor who she truly was.

blocks.speaker: Shagal
blocks.content: Tia.
At the sound of Shagal's voice, Etella's shoulder flinched, but she didn't move further.
The chains scraped coldly against the floor as Shagal crawled toward her like a beast and climbed on top of her.
The same act. The same days. Over and over.
The chain of yin and yang made each other's emotions disturbingly indistinguishable, as if they were their own.
Shame, resentment, pleasure, and anger mixed together until, in the end, they felt nothing at all.
A vortex of yin and yang.
Rian asked,

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Eight Extremes Imperial Constitution?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes. I'm planning to attack the demonic realm using the sound of sanctity. Theoretically, it's possible, but it's hard to say how effective it will be.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: You're ruthless.
Rian reflected on the resolve of Jin-Gang.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Even if it succeeds, sanctity won't be free. It'll linger, even if the physical body disappears. Jin-Gang knows this and is still determined to seek vengeance.
Lost in thought with a bitter expression, Rian turned to Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: You're not just going to let this happen, are you? I'm here now. If I use the fire of Gehenna to purify the karma of sanctity…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Even so, we can't bring it into reality. The only way is to use the Siok.
The 12 fanatics who create gaps in time.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The number 12 in law represents perception. Humans divide the whole into 12 parts: 12 hours, 12 constellations, 12 apostles, and the Siok. It's no coincidence. Even if the Siok die, their concept will simply be replaced by someone else.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: So, the plan is to place true sanctity in the Siok's position. But… where can we find it?
The assassin Lichela, hanging from Son Yoo-jung's waist, showed interest.

blocks.speaker: Lichela
blocks.content: It's probably at the Fire Management Control Branch.
Everyone's gaze shifted in that direction.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Control Branch?

blocks.speaker: Lichela
blocks.content: Yes, I heard about it once. The living who fall into hell are usually taken by the Black Riders. But it's said that, in rare cases, Satan selects elites to send there.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Elites.
Shirone rested her chin in her hand.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So those who succumbed to Satan's temptation are there. Then Mortasinger must be among them.
Mortasinger—ranked 10th in the Council of Ten and the reason Son Yoo-jung followed Ikael to the human world.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: Mortasinger?
Son Yoo-jung grabbed Lichela's hair and lifted her head.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: Where is she?

blocks.speaker: Lichela
blocks.content: I don't know exactly! I've heard he's somewhere west of hell, but I'm not sure!
Shirone interrupted.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Stop it.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: What do you even know, you fool?
When Son Yoo-jung didn't listen, Shirone raised his voice firmly.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I said, stop it.
The chain of Gingoa, wrapped around Yoo-jung's neck, tightened sharply.
Her eyes widened in shock.
Hrrgh!
On her knees, she turned to Shirone with a pitiful expression.
Huh?
Finally regaining her senses, Son Yoo-jung also noticed the strange energy radiating from a distant mountain.
Shirone's expression grew serious.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Rian.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Yes, what is that?
From the cave deep in the mountain, an indescribable, eerie presence wavered like a mirage.
Woah…
As if nothing had happened, Son Yoo-jung straightened her posture and Shirone gave a command.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let's go.
They teleported to the entrance of the cave. From the darkness, groans echoed.
A man and a woman.
Projecting a sphere of light from his palm, Shirone advanced about 30 meters and saw faint silhouettes.
Familiar faces.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Etella, Teacher?
If it had been a pleasant situation, Etella wouldn't have been crying.
Rian understood immediately.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: This is disgusting…
Drawing his broadsword, he launched himself forward, and Shagal turned his head.
Moving like a beast, Shagal instinctively raised both arms, but a flurry of swords rained down on him.
Son Yoo-jung gaped, her mouth hanging open.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: What a murderous aura…
Dozens of daggers flew simultaneously, but Rian didn't retreat.
Hmph!
With a single swing, he deflected the daggers and used the broad side of his broadsword as a shield to close the distance.
What…?
It was then that Shirone noticed the chain connecting Etella and Shagal.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Rian! Wait—
Before he could finish, Rian, with godlike strength, pinned Shagal against the wall.
Guhhh!
Blood gushed from Shagal's mouth under the pressure, and at the same time, Etella, who had been covering herself, coughed violently and vomited blood.
Realizing what was happening too late, Rian stepped back from Shagal, glaring at him like a predator.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: What's going on? Why is she…
Shirone murmured gravely.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The Chain of Yin and Yang.
It was the worst possible entanglement.
